title: elationship and checking so far out, essentially quiet breaking up, that when sh
content:
elationship and checking so far out, essentially quiet breaking up, that when she asked me to leave texas a few days after NYE, i left the next day))) fell out of love because i lost my love for anything

no work generation
total nihilism

it was in this gap that i fell too and fell and fell and fell for 8 years

after graduate school, locking in V1 of this OS, which at that time was my thesis project, finishing the LP Nick (also in FAU MFA by way of St. louis, long blonde hair skinny blue eyes glasses and pop punk dork [a few years older than me, maybe 3-4, born ~1987]), Dustin (MFA FAU by Rochester ways, hip hop whitey, activist, his thesis on homeless exploration [we both have been expelled by our family and have felt homeless], frank moody sexes all the girl, dirtbag, amazing friend [~1990]) young childhood homosexual abuse (like long term friend John Monforte)), and i settled on the 10 tracks (we recorded tons and tons of music, would meet weekly, get wasted and jam for hours at my dorm) for the one and currently only Locreance LP,

however we have:
a cubist music video i created for Locreance;
context: From document: i've been generating creative work since i was around 12 years old… — chunk 7 (chunk 7/13)
